points_of_interest.name: Kempegowda Tower
points_of_interest.description: Discover Kempegowda Tower, one of Bengaluru's four historic watchtowers built by city founder Kempegowda I. It marks the city's original boundaries, offering panoramic views and a glimpse into its past. A significant landmark for history enthusiasts and a popular spot for sunsets.

points_of_interest.name: Namma Bengaluru Aquarium
points_of_interest.description: Dive into Namma Bengaluru Aquarium, a city classic offering a tranquil escape into vibrant underwater worlds. Discover diverse freshwater and marine species, from colorful fish to impressive creatures. It’s an engaging, educational journey through aquatic biodiversity, right in the heart of Bengaluru.

points_of_interest.name: Lalbagh Botanical Garden
points_of_interest.description: Discover Lalbagh Botanical Garden, Bengaluru's iconic green lung. Founded by Hyder Ali, it boasts a magnificent glasshouse, diverse flora, and vibrant flower shows. A historical haven, it's perfect for nature lovers seeking a serene escape amidst rare plant collections.

points_of_interest.name: Tipu Sultan's Summer Palace
points_of_interest.description: Step into Tipu Sultan's ornate Summer Palace, a stunning example of Indo-Islamic wooden architecture. This historical gem in Bengaluru was the "Tiger of Mysore's" cherished retreat, showcasing intricate frescoes and a powerful legacy. A captivating glimpse into royal history!

points_of_interest.name: Bengaluru Palace
points_of_interest.description: Uncover Bengaluru's royal past at the enchanting Bengaluru Palace! This stunning Tudor and Scottish Gothic masterpiece, with its opulent interiors and rich history, offers a captivating escape from the city's modern pulse. A must-visit architectural gem contrasting old and new.

points_of_interest.name: Manchanabele Dam
points_of_interest.description: Escape to Manchanabele Dam, a scenic reservoir offering tranquil beauty and refreshing views of the Arkavathy River. Perfect for a peaceful picnic or a quick break from Bengaluru, it's a popular spot for nature lovers and a serene getaway.

points_of_interest.name: Turahalli Forest
points_of_interest.description: Turahalli Forest is Bengaluru's last standing natural forest, offering a vital green escape. Ideal for cyclists, joggers, and nature lovers, it boasts refreshing trails, peaceful solitude, and panoramic city views from its elevated spots – a true urban oasis.

points_of_interest.name: Shri Champakadhama Swamy Temple
points_of_interest.description: Step into tranquility at Bengaluru's Shri Champakadhama Swamy Temple. This ancient Vishnu shrine offers a captivating spiritual experience and architectural charm. A significant site for devotees and those seeking peace amidst history, it's a unique heritage gem worth exploring.

points_of_interest.name: Bannerghatta National Park
points_of_interest.description: Escape Bengaluru's bustle at Bannerghatta National Park! This unique urban sanctuary offers thrilling safari experiences with lions, tigers, and bears, alongside India's first butterfly park. It's an incredible wildlife adventure just a stone's throw from the city.

points_of_interest.name: Hebbala View Point
points_of_interest.description: Hebbala View Point offers stunning panoramic views of Bengaluru's evolving skyline, especially captivating at sunset overlooking Hebbal Lake. It's a significant spot for photographers and anyone seeking a tranquil escape to see the city's vibrant sprawl from a unique elevated perspective.

points_of_interest.name: ISKCON Bangalore
points_of_interest.description: Experience ISKCON Bangalore's stunning blend of modern architecture and spiritual serenity. This vibrant temple complex offers beautiful shrines, cultural programs, and delicious *prasadam*. It's a significant place for devotion, community, and finding peaceful respite amidst the city's hustle.

points_of_interest.name: FORTUNE ADVENTURES
points_of_interest.description: Fortune Adventures is Bengaluru's thrilling urban escape! Conquer high ropes, ATV tracks, and exciting team challenges in an oasis of adventure. It's the perfect spot to unleash your adventurous spirit and create unforgettable memories, breaking away from city life.

points_of_interest.name: Huskur Lake
points_of_interest.description: Huskur Lake in Bengaluru is a serene urban oasis, vital for its diverse birdlife. A peaceful escape for nature lovers and photographers, it offers tranquility amidst the city's hustle.
